Would you like to join us for dinner?
Why dont we have dinner together?
How about meeting at seven thirty?
Are you free on Friday evening?
Hi Sarah, I really enjoyed our session today. A few of us are having dinner tonight. Would you like to join us?
That is very kind, thank you. Id love to. What time were you thinking?
How about meeting at seven thirty? There is an Italian place near the venue.
Seven thirty sounds perfect. Should I bring anything, or shall we just meet there?
Just bring yourself. Dinner is my treat tonight. Are you available to stay a little later too?
I have some spare time after, so yes. By the way, may I invite my colleague Daniel?
Of course, the more the better. I will send you the address. See you at seven thirty.
Wonderful. Thank you again for the invitation, Marcos. I am looking forward to it.
Would you like to join us for dinner tonight?
Id love to. That sounds great.
Im afraid I cant tonight, but maybe another time.
Thank you for the invitation.

Hi Marcos, this is Daniel from the valuation panel. I really enjoyed our talk this morning, and a few of us are getting together for dinner tonight. We have a table booked at an Italian place near the venue, around seven thirty. It would be great if you could join us. The food is excellent, and it is a relaxed way to keep the conversation going after the sessions. Are you free this evening? If you can make it, just send me a quick message and I will share the address. I hope you can come. Talk soon.

Hi Marcos, thank you so much for the invitation to dinner on Friday. It is very kind of you to think of me. I would love to come, and I am looking forward to it. Seven thirty works perfectly for me, and the restaurant you suggested sounds wonderful. Should I bring anything, or shall we just meet there? Also, my colleague Sarah asked if she could join us. She is free that evening too. Please let me know if there is room at the table. See you on Friday, and thanks again for the kind invitation.
